original: 4 . Vivekakathā
content: 4.遠離的談論

original: 22. Sāvatthinidānaṃ [ saṃ ni.3.5.149 passitabbā].
content: 22.起源於舍衛城。

original: ‘‘ Seyyathāpi , bhikkhave, ye keci balakaraṇīyā kammantā karīyanti, sabbe te pathaviṃ nissāya pathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhāya evamete balakaraṇīyā kammantā karīyanti, evamevaṃ, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bhāveti, ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bahulīkaroti.
content: 「[[bhikkhu#比丘]]們！猶如當任何應該被力量作的工作被作時，它們全部依止於土地後，住立於土地後，這樣，這些應該被力量作的工作被作。同樣的，比丘們！比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，[[bhāveti#修習]][[ariyañcaṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ#八支聖道]]、[[bahulīkaroti#多作]]八支聖道。

original: ‘ ‘ Kathañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bhāveti, ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bahulīkaroti?
content: 比丘們！而怎樣比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，修習八支聖道、多作八支聖道？

original: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sammādiṭṭhiṃ bhāveti vivekanissitaṃ virāganissitaṃ nirodhanissitaṃ vossaggapariṇāmiṃ.
content: 比丘們！這裡，比丘[[vivekanissitaṃ#依止遠離]]、依止離貪、依止滅、[[vossaggapariṇāmiṃ#捨棄的成熟]]修習正見；

original: Sammāsaṅkappaṃ… pe… sammāvācaṃ… sammākammantaṃ… sammāājīvaṃ… sammāvāyāmaṃ… sammāsatiṃ… sammāsamādhiṃ bhāveti vivekanissitaṃ virāganissitaṃ nirodhanissitaṃ vossaggapariṇāmiṃ.
content: 正志……（中略）正語……正業……正命……正精進……正念……依止遠離、依止離貪、依止滅、捨棄的成熟修習正定，

original: Evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bhāveti, ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bahulīkaroti.
content: 比丘們！這樣，比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，修習八支聖道、多作八支聖道。」[SN.45.149]

original: 23.‘‘ Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci[ yepime( syā.) saṃ. ni.5.150 passitabbā] bījagāmabhūtagāmā vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ āpajjanti, sabbe te pathaviṃ nissāya pathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhāya evamete bījagāmabhūtagāmā vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ āpajjanti;
content: 23.「比丘們！猶如當任何[[bījagāma#種子類]]、草木類來到成長、增長、成滿時，一切都依止於土地後，住立於土地後，這樣，這些種子類、草木類來到成長、增長、成滿。

original: evamevaṃ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bhāvento ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bahulīkaronto vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ pāpuṇāti dhammesu.
content: 同樣的，比丘們！比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，當修習八支聖道、多作八支聖道時在諸法上來到成長、增長、成滿。

original: ‘ ‘ Kathañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bhāvento ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bahulīkaronto vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ pāpuṇāti dhammesu?
content: 比丘們！而怎樣比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，當修習八支聖道、多作八支聖道時在諸法上來到成長、增長、成滿？

original: Idha , bhikkhave, bhikkhu sammādiṭṭhiṃ bhāveti vivekanissitaṃ virāganissitaṃ nirodhanissitaṃ vossaggapariṇāmiṃ.
content: 比丘們！這裡，比丘依止遠離、依止離貪、依止滅、捨棄的成熟修習正見；

original: Sammāsaṅkappaṃ bhāveti… pe… sammāvācaṃ bhāveti… sammākammantaṃ bhāveti… sammāājīvaṃ bhāveti… sammāvāyāmaṃ bhāveti… sammāsatiṃ bhāveti… sammāsamādhiṃ bhāveti vivekanissitaṃ virāganissitaṃ nirodhanissitaṃ vossaggapariṇāmiṃ.
content: 修習正志……（中略）修習正語……修習正業……修習正命……修習正精進……修習正念……依止遠離、依止離貪、依止滅、捨棄的成熟修習正定。

original: Evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bhāvento ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ bahulīkaronto vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ pāpuṇāti dhammesū’’ ti.
content: 比丘們！這樣，比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，當修習八支聖道、多作八支聖道時在諸法上來到成長、增長、成滿。」[SN.45.150]

original: 1 . Maggaṅganiddeso
content: 1.道支的說明

original: 24. Sammādiṭṭhiyā pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vossaggā, dvādasa nissayā.
content: 24.對正見有五種遠離、五種離貪、五種滅、五種捨棄、十二種依止；

original: Sammāsaṅkappassa… pe… sammāvācāya… sammākammantassa… sammāājīvassa… sammāvāyāmassa… sammāsatiyā… sammāsamādhissa pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vossaggā, dvādasa nissayā.
content: 對正志……（中略）對正語……對正業……對正命……對正精進……對正念……對正定有五種遠離、五種離貪、五種滅、五種捨棄、十二種依止。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā katame pañca vivekā?
content: 對正見有哪五種遠離？

original: Vikkhambhanaviveko, tadaṅgaviveko samucchedaviveko, paṭippassaddhiviveko, nissaraṇaviveko.
content: 有鎮伏遠離、彼分遠離、斷絕遠離、安息遠離、出離遠離。

original: Vikkhambhanaviveko ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato , tadaṅgaviveko ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedaviveko ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhiviveko ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇaviveko ca nirodho nibbānaṃ.
content: 鎮伏遠離為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分遠離為對修習[[nibbedhabhāgiyo#洞察分]]定的[[diṭṭhigataṃ#惡見]]，斷絕遠離為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息遠離為在果剎那時，出離遠離為滅、涅槃。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā ime pañca vivekā.
content: 對正見有這五種遠離，

original: Imesu pañcasu vivekesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ.
content: 在這五種遠離中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā katame pañca virāgā?
content: 對正見有哪五種離貪？

original: Vikkhambhanavirāgo, tadaṅgavirāgo, samucchedavirāgo, paṭippassaddhivirāgo, nissaraṇavirāgo.
content: 有鎮伏離貪、彼分離貪、斷絕離貪、安息離貪、出離離貪。

original: Vikkhambhanavirāgo ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato, tadaṅgavirāgo ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedavirāgo ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhivirāgo ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇavirāgo ca nirodho nibbānaṃ.
content: 鎮伏離貪為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分離貪為對修習洞察分定的惡見，斷絕離貪為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息離貪為在果剎那時，出離離貪為滅、涅槃。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā ime pañca virāgā.
content: 對正見有這五種離貪，

original: Imesu pañcasu virāgesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ.
content: 在這五種離貪中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā katame pañca nirodhā?
content: 對正見有哪五種滅？

original: Vikkhambhananirodho, tadaṅganirodho, samucchedanirodho, paṭippassaddhinirodho, nissaraṇanirodho.
content: 有鎮伏滅、彼分滅、斷絕滅、安息滅、出離滅。

original: Vikkhambhananirodho ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato, tadaṅganirodho ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedanirodho ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhinirodho ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇanirodho ca amatā dhātu.
content: 鎮伏滅為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分滅為對修習洞察分定的惡見，斷絕滅為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息滅為在果剎那時，出離滅為滅、涅槃。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā ime pañca nirodhā.
content: 對正見有這五種滅，

original: Imesu pañcasu nirodhesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ.
content: 在這五種滅中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā katame pañca vossaggā?
content: 對正見有哪五種捨棄？

original: Vikkhambhanavossaggo, tadaṅgavossaggo, samucchedavossaggo, paṭippassaddhivossaggo, nissaraṇavossaggo.
content: 有鎮伏捨棄、彼分捨棄、斷絕捨棄、安息捨棄、出離捨棄。

original: Vikkhambhanavossaggo ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato, tadaṅgavossaggo ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedavossaggo ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhivossaggo ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇavossaggo ca nirodho nibbānaṃ.
content: 鎮伏捨棄為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分捨棄為對修習洞察分定的惡見，斷絕捨棄為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息捨棄為在果剎那時，出離捨棄為捨棄、涅槃。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā ime pañca vossaggā.
content: 對正見有這五種捨棄，

original: Imesu pañcasu vossaggesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ.
content: 在這五種捨棄中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。

original: Sammādiṭṭhiyā ime pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vossaggā, dvādasa nissayā.
content: 對正見有這五種遠離、五種離貪、五種滅、五種捨棄、{{note|trigger=十二種依止|text=「十二種依止」(dvādasa nissayā)，《顯揚正法》說，就是欲[被生]、信[被勝解]、心[被善確立]於遠離等四種每一種中各作三個，成為十二種依止(chandasaddhācittāniyeva vivekādīsu catūsu ekekasmiṃ tayo tayo katvā dvādasa nissayā honti)。}}。

original: 25. Sammāsaṅkappassa … pe… sammāvācāya… sammākammantassa… sammāājīvassa… sammāvāyāmassa… sammāsatiyā… sammāsamādhissa katame pañca vivekā?
content: 25.對正志……（中略）對正語……對正業……對正命……對正精進……對正念……對正定有哪五種遠離？

original: Vikkhambhanaviveko, tadaṅgaviveko, samucchedaviveko, paṭippassaddhiviveko, nissaraṇaviveko.
content: 有鎮伏遠離、彼分遠離、斷絕遠離、安息遠離、出離遠離。

original: Vikkhambhanaviveko ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato, tadaṅgaviveko ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedaviveko ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhiviveko ca phalakkhaṇe nissaraṇaviveko ca nirodho nibbānaṃ.
content: 鎮伏遠離為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分遠離為對修習洞察分定的惡見，斷絕遠離為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息遠離為在果剎那時，出離遠離為滅、涅槃。

original: Sammāsamādhissa ime pañca vivekā.
content: 對正定有這五種遠離，

original: Imesu pañcasu vivekesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ.
content: 在這五種遠離中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。

original: Sammāsamādhissa katame pañca virāgā?
content: 對正定有哪五種離貪？

original: Vikkhambhanavirāgo, tadaṅgavirāgo, samucchedavirāgo , paṭippassaddhivirāgo, nissaraṇavirāgo.
content: 有鎮伏離貪、彼分離貪、斷絕離貪、安息離貪、出離離貪。

original: Vikkhambhanavirāgo ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato, tadaṅgavirāgo ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedavirāgo ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhivirāgo ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇavirāgo ca nirodho nibbānaṃ.
content: 鎮伏離貪為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分離貪為對修習洞察分定的惡見，斷絕離貪為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息離貪為在果剎那時，出離離貪為滅、涅槃。

original: Sammāsamādhissa ime pañca virāgā.
content: 對正定有這五種離貪，

original: Imesu pañcasu virāgesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ.
content: 在這五種離貪中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。

original: Sammāsamādhissa katame pañca nirodhā?
content: 對正定有哪五種滅？

original: Vikkhambhananirodho , tadaṅganirodho, samucchedanirodho, paṭippassaddhinirodho, nissaraṇanirodho.
content: 有鎮伏滅、彼分滅、斷絕滅、安息滅、出離滅。

original: Vikkhambhananirodho ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato, tadaṅganirodho ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedanirodho ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhinirodho ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇanirodho ca amatā dhātu.
content: 鎮伏滅為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分滅為對修習洞察分定的惡見，斷絕滅為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息滅為在果剎那時，出離滅為滅、涅槃。

original: Sammāsamādhissa ime pañca nirodhā.
content: 對正定有這五種滅，

original: Imesu pañcasu nirodhesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ.
content: 在這五種滅中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。

original: Sammāsamādhissa katame pañca vossaggā?
content: 對正定有哪五種捨棄？

original: Vikkhambhanavossaggo, tadaṅgavossaggo, samucchedavossaggo, paṭippassaddhivossaggo, nissaraṇavossaggo.
content: 有鎮伏捨棄、彼分捨棄、斷絕捨棄、安息捨棄、出離捨棄。

original: Vikkhambhanavossaggo ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato, tadaṅgavossaggo ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedavossaggo ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhivossaggo ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇavossaggo ca nirodho nibbānaṃ.
content: 鎮伏捨棄為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分捨棄為對修習洞察分定的惡見，斷絕捨棄為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息捨棄為在果剎那時，出離捨棄為捨棄、涅槃。

original: Sammāsamādhissa ime pañca vossaggā.
content: 對正定有這五種捨棄，

original: Imesu pañcasu vossaggesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ.
content: 在這五種捨棄中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。

original: Sammāsamādhissa ime pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vossaggā, dvādasa nissayā.
content: 對正定有五種遠離、五種離貪、五種滅、五種捨棄、十二種依止。

original: 26.‘‘ Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci balakaraṇīyā kammantā karīyanti , sabbe te pathaviṃ nissāya pathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhāya evamete balakaraṇīyā kammantā karīyanti;
content: 26.「比丘們！猶如當任何應該被力量作的工作被作時，它們全部依止於土地後，住立於土地後，這樣，這些應該被力量作的工作被作。

original: evamevaṃ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya satta bojjhaṅge bhāveti, satta bojjhaṅge bahulīkaroti… pe… satta bojjhaṅge bhāvento satta bojjhaṅge bahulīkaronto vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ pāpuṇāti dhammesu… pe… pañca balāni bhāveti, pañca balāni bahulīkaroti… pe… pañca balāni bhāvento pañca balāni bahulīkaronto vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ pāpuṇāti dhammesu… pe… pañcindriyāni bhāveti, pañcindriyāni bahulīkaroti… pe….
content: 同樣的，比丘們！比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，修習七覺支、多作七覺支……（中略）當修習七覺支、多作七覺支時在諸法上來到成長、增長、成滿。……（中略）修習五力、多作五力……（中略）當修習五力、多作五力時在諸法上來到成長、增長、成滿。……（中略）修習五根、多作五根……（中略）。

original: ‘ ‘ Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci bījagāmabhūtagāmā vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ āpajjanti, sabbe te pathaviṃ nissāya pathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhāya evamete bījagāmabhūtagāmā vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ āpajjanti, evamevaṃ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya pañcindriyāni bhāvento pañcindriyāni bahulīkaronto vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ pāpuṇāti dhammesu.
content: 比丘們！猶如當任何種子類、草木類來到成長、增長、成滿時，一切都依止於土地後，住立於土地後，這樣，這些種子類、草木類來到成長、增長、成滿。同樣的，比丘們！比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，當修習五根、多作五根時在諸法上來到成長、增長、成滿。

original: ‘ ‘ Kathañca , bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya pañcindriyāni bhāvento pañcindriyāni bahulīkaronto vuddhiṃ virūḷhiṃ vepullaṃ pāpuṇāti dhammesu?
content: 比丘們！而怎樣比丘依止於戒後，住立於戒後，當修習五根、多作五根時在諸法上來到成長、增長、成滿？

original: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saddhindriyaṃ bhāveti vivekanissitaṃ virāganissitaṃ nirodhanissitaṃ vossaggapariṇāmiṃ.
content: 比丘們！這裡，比丘依止遠離、依止離貪、依止滅、捨棄的成熟修習信根；

original: Vīriyindriyaṃ bhāveti… pe… satindriyaṃ bhāveti… pe… samādhindriyaṃ bhāveti… pe… paññindriyaṃ bhāveti vivekanissitaṃ virāganissitaṃ nirodhanissitaṃ vossaggapariṇāmiṃ.
content: 修習活力根……（中略）修習念根……（中略）修習定根……（中略）依止遠離、依止離貪、依止滅、捨棄的成熟修習慧根。

original: Evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṃ nissāya… pe… pāpuṇāti dhammesū’’ ti.
content: 比丘們！這樣，比丘依止於戒後……（中略）在諸法上達成[增長、成長、成熟]。」

original: 2 . Indriyaniddeso
content: 2.根的說明

original: 27. Saddhindriyassa pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vossaggā, dvādasa nissayā.
content: 27.對信根有五種遠離、五種離貪、五種滅、五種捨棄、十二種依止；

original: Vīriyindriyassa… pe… satindriyassa… samādhindriyassa… paññindriyassa pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vossaggā, dvādasa nissayā.
content: 對活力根……（中略）對念根……對定根……對慧根有五種遠離、五種離貪、五種滅、五種捨棄、十二種依止。

original: Saddhindriyassa katame pañca vivekā?
content: 對信根有哪五種遠離？

original: Vikkhambhanaviveko, tadaṅgaviveko, samucchedaviveko, paṭippassaddhiviveko, nissaraṇaviveko.
content: 有鎮伏遠離、彼分遠離、斷絕遠離、安息遠離、出離遠離。

original: Vikkhambhanaviveko ca nīvaraṇānaṃ paṭhamajjhānaṃ bhāvayato, tadaṅgaviveko ca diṭṭhigatānaṃ nibbedhabhāgiyaṃ samādhiṃ bhāvayato, samucchedaviveko ca lokuttaraṃ khayagāmimaggaṃ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhiviveko ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇaviveko ca nirodho nibbānaṃ.
content: 鎮伏遠離為對修習初禪的諸蓋，彼分遠離為對修習洞察分定的惡見，斷絕遠離為對修習導向滅盡之道的岀世間，安息遠離為在果剎那時，出離遠離為滅、涅槃。

original: Saddhindriyassa ime pañca vivekā.
content: 對信根有這五種遠離，

original: Imesu pañcasu vivekesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṃ… pe… saddhindriyassa ime pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vossaggā, dvādasa nissayā.
content: 在這五種遠離中欲被生、信被勝解、心被善確立。……（中略）對信根有這五種遠離、五種離貪、五種滅、五種捨棄、十二種依止。

original: Vīriyindriyassa … pe… satindriyassa… pe… samādhindriyassa… paññindriyassa katame pañca vivekā?
content: 對活力根……（中略）對念根……（中略）對定根……對慧根有哪五種遠離？

original: Vikkhambhanaviveko, tadaṅgaviveko, samucchedaviveko, paṭippassaddhiviveko, nissaraṇaviveko… pe… paññindriyassa ime pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā , pañca vossaggā, dvādasa nissayāti.
content: 有鎮伏遠離、彼分遠離、斷絕遠離、安息遠離、出離遠離。……（中略）對慧根有這五種遠離、五種離貪、五種滅、五種捨棄、十二種依止。

original: Vivekakathā niṭṭhitā.
content: 遠離的說明終了。
